prediction.reasoning: Using a random walk model with historical volatility estimation for MMM. Large-cap stocks like 3M typically have daily volatility around 1.5-2%. Over 6 days, this translates to approximately 3.7-4.9% total volatility. The point estimate assumes no drift (efficient market hypothesis). Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with estimated 6-day standard deviation of approximately 2.3% of current price.
